reference.title: Get Help and Find Your Mac Serial Number
reference.shortdesc: This topic explains when to contact IT support and what information to provide, including how to locate your Mac serial number.

ul.li: You cannot sign in after multiple attempts
The Mac cannot connect to Wi-Fi
Microsoft 365 apps do not open or do not recognize your account
Applications or Self Service are missing
Setup does not appear to be complete

ol.li: Copy or record the serial number.

section.title: Information to include when contacting support

ul.li:
Your company email address
Example: jbob@mycompany.com
A screenshot or description of the issue
